_meta.description: Cinema & Geography questions. Mechanic: 'Where was this scene filmed?'. Movie title is shown as context (not a spoiler — the answer is always a place). Only reviewStatus=approved questions are seeded.

prompt.es: La icónica escena en que Ethan Hunt escala el exterior del Burj Khalifa en Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol (2011) fue filmada en qué ciudad?
prompt.en: The iconic scene where Ethan Hunt scales the exterior of the Burj Khalifa in Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol (2011) was filmed in which city?

sources.claim: The Burj Khalifa climbing sequence is a centerpiece of Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol (2011, dir. Brad Bird).

prompt.es: La persecución nocturna del casino y las calles en Black Panther (2018) fue filmada principalmente en qué ciudad surcoreana?
prompt.en: The nighttime casino and street chase sequence in Black Panther (2018) was filmed mainly in which South Korean city?

sources.claim: Black Panther (2018) filmed its casino and street chase sequence on location in Busan, South Korea.

prompt.es: El Hotel Sidi Driss en Matmata, usado como el hogar de Luke Skywalker en Star Wars: Una nueva esperanza, se encuentra en qué país norteafricano?
prompt.en: Hotel Sidi Driss in Matmata, used as Luke Skywalker's home in Star Wars: A New Hope, is located in which North African country?

sources.claim: Hotel Sidi Driss in Matmata, Tunisia, served as the interior of the Lars homestead on Tatooine in Star Wars: A New Hope.

prompt.es: El exterior del Hotel Overlook en El Resplandor (The Shining, 1980) fue filmado usando las tomas exteriores de qué hotel real en Oregón, EE.UU.?
prompt.en: The exterior of the Overlook Hotel in The Shining (1980) was filmed using exterior shots of which real hotel in Oregon, USA?

sources.claim: Timberline Lodge on Mt. Hood, Oregon, was used for the exterior shots of the Overlook Hotel in The Shining (1980, dir. Stanley Kubrick).

movie.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

prompt.es: El set de rodaje de Hobbiton, hogar de los hobbits en El Señor de los Anillos y El Hobbit, está ubicado permanentemente en qué país y es hoy un destino turístico?
prompt.en: The Hobbiton film set, home of the hobbits in The Lord of the Rings and The Hobbit trilogies, is permanently located in which country and is now a tourist destination?

sources.claim: The Hobbiton Movie Set is located on a farm near Matamata, New Zealand, and is open to the public.

prompt.es: El exterior y gran parte del interior del Grand Budapest Hotel en la película de Wes Anderson fueron filmados en qué ciudad de Alemania?
prompt.en: The exterior and much of the interior of the Grand Budapest Hotel in the Wes Anderson film were filmed in which German city?

sources.claim: The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014, dir. Wes Anderson) was largely filmed in Görlitz, Germany, using the historic Kaufhaus department store as the hotel interior.

answer.realLocation: Maya Bay, Ko Phi Phi Leh

prompt.es: La bahía de Maya Bay, escenario principal de The Beach (2000) con Leonardo DiCaprio, se encuentra en qué país del sudeste asiático?
prompt.en: Maya Bay, the main location of The Beach (2000) starring Leonardo DiCaprio, is located in which Southeast Asian country?

sources.claim: Maya Bay on Ko Phi Phi Leh island, Thailand, was the primary filming location for The Beach (2000, dir. Danny Boyle).

prompt.es: Lost in Translation (2003) de Sofia Coppola fue filmada casi en su totalidad en qué ciudad, cuya estética nocturna neon es central para la atmósfera de la película?
prompt.en: Sofia Coppola's Lost in Translation (2003) was filmed almost entirely in which city, whose neon nocturnal aesthetic is central to the film's atmosphere?

sources.claim: Lost in Translation (2003) was filmed on location in Tokyo, primarily at the Park Hyatt Tokyo hotel and around the Shibuya district.

prompt.es: In Bruges (2008), la comedia negra de Martin McDonagh sobre dos sicarios escondidos en una ciudad medieval flamenca, fue filmada y transcurre en qué país?
prompt.en: In Bruges (2008), Martin McDonagh's dark comedy about two hitmen hiding in a medieval Flemish city, was filmed and set in which country?

sources.claim: In Bruges (2008, dir. Martin McDonagh) was filmed on location in Bruges, Belgium.

prompt.es: ¿En qué ciudad austriaca fue ambientada y filmada la mayor parte de The Sound of Music (1965), la película basada en la familia Von Trapp?
prompt.en: In which Austrian city was most of The Sound of Music (1965), the film based on the Von Trapp family, set and filmed?

sources.claim: The Sound of Music (1965) was filmed extensively in and around Salzburg, Austria.

movie.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

prompt.es: El Tesoro de Petra, que aparece como entrada al templo del Santo Grial en Indiana Jones y la última cruzada, se encuentra en qué país?
prompt.en: The Treasury of Petra, featured as the entrance to the Holy Grail temple in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade, is located in which country?

sources.claim: The Treasury (Al-Khazneh) at Petra, Jordan, was used for the final Holy Grail sequence of Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989).

movie.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

prompt.es: El Castillo de Alnwick, usado como Hogwarts en las primeras películas de Harry Potter, se encuentra en qué país?
prompt.en: Alnwick Castle, used as Hogwarts in the early Harry Potter films, is located in which country?

sources.claim: Alnwick Castle (Northumberland) was used as a filming location for the Hogwarts broomstick flying lessons in Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone (2001).

answer.realLocation: Kauai island (Allerton Garden, Na Pali Coast)

prompt.es: Las selvas tropicales de qué isla de Hawái sirvieron como locación principal para las escenas del parque en Jurassic Park (1993) de Steven Spielberg?
prompt.en: The tropical jungles of which Hawaiian island served as the main filming location for the park scenes in Steven Spielberg's Jurassic Park (1993)?

sources.claim: Jurassic Park (1993) was primarily filmed on Kauai, Hawaii, including locations at Allerton Garden and the Na Pali Coast.

prompt.es: La isla de Skopelos, escenario de Mamma Mia! (2008), pertenece a qué país mediterráneo?
prompt.en: The island of Skopelos, setting of Mamma Mia! (2008), belongs to which Mediterranean country?

sources.claim: Mamma Mia! (2008) was filmed primarily on the Greek island of Skopelos, with additional scenes on Skiathos.

answer.realLocation: Mexico City, Zócalo and historic center

prompt.es: La espectacular secuencia de apertura de Spectre (2015), filmada durante un desfile del Día de los Muertos, transcurre en qué ciudad?
prompt.en: The spectacular opening sequence of Spectre (2015), filmed during a Day of the Dead parade, takes place in which city?

sources.claim: The Day of the Dead opening sequence in Spectre (2015) was filmed in Mexico City.

prompt.es: En Casino Royale (2006), el casino de Montenegro donde Bond disputa el torneo de póker fue representado usando el Grandhotel Pupp en qué ciudad checa?
prompt.en: In Casino Royale (2006), the Montenegro casino where Bond plays in the poker tournament was represented using the Grandhotel Pupp in which Czech city?

sources.claim: The Grandhotel Pupp in Karlovy Vary, Czech Republic, was used as the fictional Casino Royale hotel in Montenegro in Casino Royale (2006).

prompt.es: La secuencia de apertura de Skyfall (2012), que incluye una persecución por el Gran Bazar y un combate encima de un tren, fue filmada en qué ciudad?
prompt.en: The opening sequence of Skyfall (2012), which includes a chase through the Grand Bazaar and a fight on top of a train, was filmed in which city?

sources.claim: The opening sequence of Skyfall (2012) was filmed in Istanbul, Turkey, including the Grand Bazaar.

prompt.es: En Gladiator (2000), las escenas que representan los mercados de esclavos y el desierto del norte de África fueron filmadas principalmente en qué país norteafricano?
prompt.en: In Gladiator (2000), the scenes representing North African slave markets and desert landscapes were filmed mainly in which North African country?

sourceClaims.claim: Gladiator (2000) filmed its North African sequences in Ouarzazate, Morocco.

prompt.es: Wadi Rum, el desierto donde se filmaron las escenas más icónicas de Lawrence de Arabia (1962), se encuentra en qué país?
prompt.en: Wadi Rum, the desert where the most iconic scenes of Lawrence of Arabia (1962) were filmed, is located in which country?

sources.claim: Lawrence of Arabia (1962, dir. David Lean) was filmed extensively in Wadi Rum, Jordan.

prompt.es: En The Dark Knight (2008), la ciudad ficticia de Gotham City fue representada principalmente usando locaciones de qué ciudad real de EE.UU.?
prompt.en: In The Dark Knight (2008), the fictional Gotham City was primarily represented using locations from which real US city?

sources.claim: The Dark Knight (2008, dir. Christopher Nolan) used Chicago as the primary filming location for Gotham City.

answer.realLocation: Notting Hill and Portobello Road, London

prompt.es: La película Notting Hill (1999) con Hugh Grant y Julia Roberts fue filmada en el barrio del mismo nombre en qué ciudad?
prompt.en: The film Notting Hill (1999) starring Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts was filmed in the neighborhood of the same name in which city?

sources.claim: Notting Hill (1999) was filmed on location in the Notting Hill neighborhood of London, including Portobello Road.

prompt.es: El barrio de Montmartre, donde transcurre gran parte de Amélie (2001), se encuentra en qué ciudad francesa?
prompt.en: The Montmartre neighborhood, where much of Amélie (2001) takes place, is located in which French city?

sources.claim: Amélie (2001) was filmed primarily in the Montmartre neighborhood of Paris, with key scenes at the Café des 2 Moulins.

answer.realLocation: County Meath and other Irish locations

prompt.es: Braveheart (1995) está ambientada en Escocia, pero la mayor parte de sus grandes escenas de batalla fueron filmadas en qué país, usando al ejército local como extras?
prompt.en: Braveheart (1995) is set in Scotland, but most of its large battle scenes were filmed in which country, using the local army as extras?

sources.claim: The large battle scenes in Braveheart (1995, dir. Mel Gibson) were filmed in County Meath, Ireland, with the Irish Army Reserve serving as extras.

movie.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

prompt.es: Los claustros de la Catedral de Gloucester, utilizados como pasillos de Hogwarts en Harry Potter, se encuentran en qué país?
prompt.en: The cloisters of Gloucester Cathedral, used as Hogwarts corridors in Harry Potter, are located in which country?

sources.claim: The cloisters of Gloucester Cathedral were used for the Hogwarts corridor scenes in Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone (2001) and other early films in the series.

prompt.es: En Doctor Strange (2016), el ficticio centro místico de Kamar-Taj se presenta como ubicado en Katmandú, Nepal, pero las escenas callejeras de esa ciudad fueron rodadas en qué ciudad de Asia del Sur?
prompt.en: In Doctor Strange (2016), the fictional mystical compound Kamar-Taj is presented as located in Kathmandu, Nepal, but the street scenes of that city were shot in which South Asian city?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Doctor Strange
alt.en: Reference visual card for Doctor Strange

sourceClaims.claim: Doctor Strange (2016) filmed Kathmandu street scenes on location in Kathmandu, Nepal.

prompt.es: Las Cataratas del Iguazú, escenario principal de La Misión (1986) con Robert De Niro, se ubican en la frontera de Brasil y qué otro país sudamericano (donde se rodaron la mayoría de las escenas)?
prompt.en: Iguazú Falls, the main setting of The Mission (1986) starring Robert De Niro, sit on the border of Brazil and which other South American country (where most scenes were shot)?

sources.claim: The Mission (1986, dir. Roland Joffé) was filmed at Iguazu Falls on the Argentina–Brazil border.
